backend/main.mo: Main actor for the DivyaVastra backend that manages a product catalog with initialization functions for Gopi Skirt and Short Kurti products, plus query and update methods for product management.
backend/migration.mo: Simple migration module that passes the existing products map from the old actor state to the new actor state unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (Radha Krishna theme, Instagram footer link, Short Kurtis section, product photos) to their corresponding source files and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles in the DivyaVastra devotional-themed storefront.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark mode design tokens used by shadcn-ui components.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the DivyaVastra React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders the HomePage as the sole page of the single-page storefront.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component with a peacock blue gradient background, three feature cards (Crafted with Love, Premium Quality, Festive Elegance), and decorative gold dividers in the Radha Krishna devotional theme.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedProducts: Reusable product grid component that renders ProductCards with skeleton loading, error, and empty states, styled for the Gopi Skirts collection section.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, Instagram contact link, quick navigation links, and a decorative gold/saffron top band.
frontend/src/components/GopiSkirtsSectio: Displays the Gopi Skirts product section, fetching products by category via a custom hook and rendering skeleton loaders, error states, or a product card grid.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with logo, desktop navigation links, a 'Shop Now' CTA button, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-width hero section with a Radha Krishna banner image, overlay gradients, brand headline, tagline, and CTA buttons linking to the product collections.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Reusable product card component that displays a product image, category tag, availability badge, name, and price, with peacock or lotus accent color themes.
frontend/src/components/ShortKurtisSecti: React section component that displays Short Kurti products fetched by category, with a skeleton loading state, error/empty states, and decorative floral styling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, login, and logout via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching products (all and by category) and mutations for initializing Gopi and Kurti product data via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind directives, defining a Radha Krishna-themed OKLCH color palette with CSS variables for light/dark modes and reusable component utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main page component that composes the full page layout (Header, Hero, GopiSkirts, ShortKurtis, About, Footer) and auto-initializes backend product data if none exist.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens (peacock, divine-gold, saffron, lotus), custom font families, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the DivyaVastra project state including version, feature history, architectural notes, image requirements, and existing/planned features for a Radha Krishna-themed ladies clothing website.
